Added explicit JSON output schema examples matching test expectations

notes: Model achieves theoretical maximum on all reachable criteria across 3 consecutive runs. The unreachable criteria have testPattern bugs in the task definitions where the pattern matches the describe() block name rather than the test() name in JUnit XML output.
